confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_ea9ce332-63a2-4eb5-bc9a-4bfd2cd5b637 read back as received

evidence: Task 618 acceptance criteria: roster commands are authoritative on SQLite only; no normal roster operator requires or trusts .ai/agents/roster.json.
packages/task-governance/src/task-governance.ts still contains: SQLite exists but is empty — fall through to JSON fallback.
The thrown error is: Roster not found in SQLite or JSON (.ai/agents/roster.json).
narada task roster add calls loadRoster before inserting a new agent, so an empty SQLite roster cannot be bootstrapped through the normal command.
Observed command failure: narada work-next --agent narada-andrey.builder --cwd /mnt/c/Users/Andrey/Narada returns reason=roster_unavailable.
payload.observation: In the Windows User Site, narada work-next --agent narada-andrey.builder fails with roster_unavailable. The failure is not because roster.json should exist; it is because loadRoster falls through from an empty SQLite agent_roster table to the retired JSON fallback. task roster add also calls loadRoster first, so it cannot create the first roster row from an empty SQLite-only Site.
payload.proposed_direction: Make empty SQLite agent_roster a valid empty roster. Remove JSON fallback from normal roster authority paths or make it an explicit migration/import operator. Make task roster add able to create the first SQLite row. Make work-next report agent_not_in_roster with a repair command, or materialize declared default role contracts when the Site config provides them.
payload.requested_handling: Open a Narada proper corrective task because current behavior contradicts the completed SQLite-only roster cutover.
payload.summary: Narada proper Task 618 says roster authority is SQLite-only and normal roster operators no longer require or trust .ai/agents/roster.json, but the current roster loader still treats empty SQLite as failure, falls back to .ai/agents/roster.json, and errors when the JSON file is absent.
payload.title: Roster loading still falls back to retired roster.json and blocks empty SQLite bootstrap
